ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for member login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership type */,
  "dues" TEXT /* Annual dues for the membership type */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the membership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership history record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the membership type or status changed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the membership type or status will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_history_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES membership_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_history_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES membership_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member on the committee (e.g., Chair, Member) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member's assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member's assignment will end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_assignments_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee chair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the member registered for the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the member (e.g., Attended, Did not attend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment will end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
